pagecheckout-desc: Allows exclusive rights on a page for a user
pagecheckout-error-no-checkout: Cannot unlock page that is not currently locked
pagecheckout-error-no-checkout-id: Unlock failure! No lock ID set
pagecheckout-error-db-retrieve-inserted: Failed to retrieve previously inserted lock
pagecheckout-lockdown-reason: Action "$1" is not allowed, because page is locked by $2
apihelp-pagecheckout-clear-param-page_ti: Title of the page for which to clear lock
pagecheckout-ui-clear-confirm: Confirm clearing active lock on this page? This will make page editable for all normally eligible users
log-description-pagecheckout: Tracks the state of page locks and unlocks
logentry-pagecheckout-checkin: $1 {{GENDER:$2|locked}} page $3 that was checked out for user $4
pagecheckout-alertbanner-checkout-with-c: This page is currently {{GENDER:$1|locked}} for $2. Comment: $3
page-checkout-workflow-activity-checkout: This page is currently checked out due to a running workflow
page-checkout-workflow-clear-checkout: Checkout cleared due to workflow abort
pagecheckout-ui-workflows-inspector-acti: For whom page will be locked
If not specified, workflow context page will be used
If true, will remove any existing lock (for other users) and create a new lock
For whom page will be unlocked
If not specified, workflow context page will be used
pagecheckout-checkin-not-checked-out-by-: Page is not locked by this user
pagecheckout-ui-checkout-confirm: You are about to lock page. This will grant you exclusive editing rights until you unlock the page.
pagecheckout-ui-checkin-confirm: You are about to unlock this page. This will allow other users to edit the page.
pagecheckout-ui-checkout-prompt-ve: Do you want to lock this page? This will grant you exclusive editing rights until you unlock the page.
pagecheckout-prompt-on-edit: Get a prompt to check out the page when starting an edit
pagecheckout-alertbanner-checkout-by-you: This page is currently locked for you. You have exclusive editing rights.
pagecheckout-workflow-activity-checkout-: This page is currently locked due to a running workflow
pagecheckout-workflow-clear-checkout: Lock cleared due to workflow abort
pagecheckout-ns-pref-show-popup: Prompt to lock page when editing
